title: Add support for host-gateway
body:
This PR requires the changes of https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1549

```release-note
The `--add-host` option now accepts the special string `host-gateway` instead of an IP Address, which will be mapped to the host IP address. 
```

comments.body: @geichelberger When you rebase your c/common changes should already in podman, then just use the constant and we can merge this.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *geichelberger*, *Luap99*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
